message:
Add Biome linter/formatter and prek pre-commit hooks

Biome configured for single-quote, 2-space indent, trailing commas.
noExplicitAny off for hook-helpers (parses raw JSON), noNonNullAssertion
off for tests (intentional crash on match failure). prek runs biome
check and tsc rebuild on commit. CI runs lint before build.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -20,6 +20,10 @@ jobs:
       - run: npm ci
         working-directory: server
 
+      - name: Lint and format check
+        run: npm run check
+        working-directory: server
+
       - run: npm run build
         working-directory: server

@@ -0,0 +1,16 @@
+repos:
+  - repo: local
+    hooks:
+      - id: biome
+        name: biome check
+        entry: npx biome check --write --no-errors-on-unmatched
+        language: system
+        types: [ts]
+        pass_filenames: true
+
+      - id: tsc-rebuild
+        name: rebuild dist
+        entry: bash -c 'cd server && npx tsc && git add dist/'
+        language: system
+        files: ^server/src/
+        pass_filenames: false

@@ -1 +1,6 @@
+/**
+ * End-to-end workflow simulation:
+ * Simulates a realistic debugging session where Claude is working on a project,
+ * makes decisions, investigates bugs, hits compaction, and recovers context.
+ */
 export {};
